Cannot convert value "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Model>
  <!--DEFAULT COMMAND-->
  <Command Name="__default_command" IsBranch="false" IsDefault="true" 
ClrType="Wcom.Pr.Validation.Tool.Commands.ValidateCommand" 
Settings="Wcom.Pr.Validation.Tool.Models.ValidateCommandSettings">
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="" Long="branch,source-branch" Value="NULL" Required="false"
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Source branch name (overrides 
SYSTEM_PULLREQUEST_SOURCEBRANCH environment variable)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="format" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Run dotnet format on the repository and commit any changes 
back to the PR</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="keep-repo" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Keep the cloned repository directory (pr-src) after 
validation for debugging purposes</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="pat,personal-access-token" Value="NULL" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Personal Access Token for Azure DevOps (overrides AZDO_PAT 
environment variable)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="pr,pull-request-id" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Pull request ID (overrides SYSTEM_PULLREQUEST_PULLREQUESTID
environment variable)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="repo,repository" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Repository URI (overrides 
SYSTEM_PULLREQUEST_SOURCEREPOSITORYURI environment variable)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="target-dir,pr-src-dir" Value="NULL" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Target directory where the cloned repository (pr-src) 
should be placed (default: 'pr-src' in current directory)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Output verbose/debug messages</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
  </Command>" to type "System.Xml.XmlDocument". Error: "Unexpected end of file has occurred. The following elements are not closed: Model. Line 48, position 13."
